name: Logan Medical
description_short: Logan Medical Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Cache Valley's medical community for over 50 years, offering auto loans, signature loans, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Logan Medical Federal Credit Union has been serving the medical community of Cache Valley, Utah for over 50 years. As a federal credit union, it is member-owned and not-for-profit, insuring member deposits through NCUA rather than the FDIC. The credit union operates from its main branch at 500 E 1400 N Logan, UT 84341 and provides access to additional locations through the CO-OP Shared Branch network.

The institution offers a range of consumer financial products including auto loans starting at 4.74% APR, signature loans beginning at 13.00% APR, Kwik Cash loans at 10.75% APR, and trailer loans from 7.20% APR. Members can access online bill pay with features including payment reminders, recurring payments, and transaction history. The credit union also provides youth savings accounts designed to teach financial literacy and long-term savings habits, with incentive-based features to encourage deposits.

Logan Medical FCU distinguishes itself by focusing specifically on the medical community within Cache Valley, providing a membership-based approach rather than serving the general public. The credit union emphasizes accessibility through CO-OP Shared Branch locations and online account access. Their 50+ year operational history suggests institutional stability and community integration within the healthcare sector of the region.

As a credit union, Logan Medical offers member-centric benefits through profit-sharing and lower rates compared to traditional banks, though membership may be restricted to those working in or affiliated with the medical field. The available rate information shows competitive auto lending rates, though signature loan rates at 13% represent a moderate cost for unsecured borrowing. The website content is limited, making comprehensive service evaluation difficult beyond the advertised products.
services: Online bill pay with recurring payment setup
Youth savings accounts with prize incentives
CO-OP Shared Branch network access (30,000+ locations)
pros: Auto loan rates starting at 4.74% APR are competitive for credit union lending
Online bill pay with automated reminders and recurring payment capabilities
Access to 30,000+ CO-OP Shared Branch locations nationwide beyond main branch
Youth savings accounts with educational components and prize incentives
Over 50 years of operational history serving Cache Valley community
Member-owned structure means potential dividend earnings and profit-sharing
Kwik Cash short-term loan option at 10.75% APR for emergency cash needs
cons: Membership likely restricted to medical professionals or affiliated employees, limiting accessibility
Limited online presence and minimal information about deposit rates or account types on website
Signature loan rates at 13.00% APR are higher than secured auto lending options
Single physical branch location in Logan, Utah limits walk-in access for non-local members
Website lacks information on specific membership eligibility requirements or qualification process
best_for: Medical professionals and healthcare workers in Cache Valley seeking competitive auto financing
Credit union members wanting online bill pay with automated payment management
Parents wanting to teach children savings habits through incentive-based youth accounts
Healthcare community members needing short-term emergency cash through Kwik Cash loans
diagnosis: Logan Medical Federal Credit Union is best for medical professionals and healthcare workers in the Cache Valley region seeking credit union membership benefits and competitive auto loan rates. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility appears restricted to the medical community, and the limited website information makes it difficult to assess the full range of deposit products, savings rates, and complete service offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
